title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN SITIO CABAGAAYAN, BARANGAY SIBULAN, TORIL DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABAGAAYAN, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABAGAAYAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 21, 5255 (May 27, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11266, April 12, 2019 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN SITIO CABAGAAYAN, BARANGAY SIBULAN, TORIL DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABAGAAYAN, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABAGAAYAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, an elementary school in Sitio Cabagaayan, Barangay Sibulan, Toril District, Davao City to be known as the Cabagaayan Elementary School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's progrma the operationalization of Cabagaayan Elementary School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of the Department of Education shall formulate the rules and regulations implementing the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of the Department of Education shall formulate the rules and regulations implementing the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representative and the Senate of the Philippines on December 10, 2018 and February 6, 2019, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APR 12 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
